description: Canonical prefixes for SYNTH Expedition and Program identifiers. Every EXP-XXX-NNN identifier must use a registered prefix.

AX.name: Agent Experience
AX.description: Adoption-era expeditions focused on AI-first distribution and first-contact experience.

CONT.name: Cognitive Continuity
CONT.description: Continuity-of-intent expeditions (resume briefing, interruption benchmark, regression journey).

DISC.name: Runtime Self-Description
DISC.description: Discoverability and self-description expeditions (status, extraction reporting, introspection, repository identity).

DOCS.name: Documentation & Projections
DOCS.description: Documentation projection system and derived artifact expeditions.

ENV.name: Environment Independence
ENV.description: Constitutional environment independence and capability provider expeditions.

FIRSTCONTACT.name: First Contact & Public Identity
FIRSTCONTACT.description: Public narrative, product identity, and first-contact experience expeditions.

HARDEN.name: Constitutional Hardening
HARDEN.description: Constitutional hardening expeditions (Mission Studio, Snapshot, Genesis, Replay, Graph Integrity, Validation, Observability).

INSTALL.name: Installation & Distribution
INSTALL.description: Installation, distribution, and bootstrap installer expeditions.

MST.name: Mission Studio
MST.description: Mission Studio planning and cognition expeditions.

PROD.name: Productization
PROD.description: Productization program expeditions (snapshot lineage, documentation, operator journey, freeze).

REL.name: Release
REL.description: Public release program expeditions (repository, docs, examples, website, OSS readiness).

TRUST.name: Operator Trust & CLI Integrity
TRUST.description: Operator trust expeditions (govern recursion guard, draft integrity, evidence path, decision events).

VAL.name: Validation
VAL.description: Validation program expeditions (agent onboarding, bootstrap, publication, integrity, benchmark).

PROGRAM.name: Program
PROGRAM.description: Program-level containers that group related expeditions.
